untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'intraday trend exhaustion pattern' and 'gap opening direction' which are not available as atomic indicators in the allowed list. These require multi-bar pattern recognition or gap detection logic not expressible with single-bar indicator comparisons. The 75% recovery exit target also requires dynamic calculation of prior move amplitude, which cannot be expressed without indexing past bars beyond prev_* variables.
translation_notes: Translated core mean-reversion logic: entry when price deviates ±1% from 50-bar MA (approximated as close crossing sma_50 with returns threshold). Exit at MA or on reversal. Hold capped at 6 bars as specified. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal. Pattern exhaustion and gap conditions marked untranslatable.
